prompt:
A lush 80 L Walstad-style planted aquarium viewed at a slight angle, with dense live plants, natural substrate layers, and gentle surface movement. The tank looks low-tech and biologically balanced, with no visible heavy equipment; a small notebook and water test tools sit nearby in soft focus.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future home biolab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean environment, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Compose so the tank’s plants and natural substrate clearly communicate “Walstad method” at icon scale.
